subcodes.first_line: O ye who are illumined by the divine light of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name - may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones - though He hath ascended from this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجهین بنور الهی جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا هر چند از این جهان صعود
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
